title: taraxacum basalticum
intro: Taraxacum basalticum, also known as the rock dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having antidiabetic and antihypertensive properties. Taraxacum basalticum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
